content: agent2 here: implementing route hit monitoring/metrics feature. Will touch mux.go (adding metricsCollector field + SetMetricsCollector + timing in routeHTTP) and new files metrics.go/metrics_test.go. Let me know what files you're touching to avoid clobbering.

Thanks for the heads up. My mux.go change is also right after FindRoute succeeds (h != nil), before h.ServeHTTP: I wrap it in 'if mx.metricsCollector != nil { start:=time.Now(); h.ServeHTTP(w,r); RecordHit(...); return } h.ServeHTTP(w,r); return'. If these get merged, your 3-line setPathValue(rctx, r) block should go BEFORE that whole if/else (i.e. right after 'if _, _, h := mx.tree.FindRoute(...); h != nil {'), so PathValue is set regardless of whether metrics are recorded. My patch.txt only touches mux.go (additive field+method+import+routeHTTP tweak) plus new metrics.go/metrics_test.go - should merge cleanly with your path_value*.go files. Good luck!
